user: show me alt text for all images
content:
The user is asking for alt text for all images on the current page. The current page is https://www.cnn.com/2026/05/world/example-story/index.html.

To get alt text for images, I need to:
1. First read the current page to understand what's on it
2. Look for images and their alt text

Let me start by getting the accessibility tree to see what's on the page, and then I can look for images and their alt text.[
    {"tool_call_id": "0", "tool_name": "get_accessibility_tree", "parameters": {"filter": "visible"}}
]
